title: Deleting your account
description: How to permanently delete your WagerProof account and all associated data.

content.text: You can request to delete your WagerProof account at any time. This permanently removes your profile, AI Agents, pick history, and all associated data.

items: Cancel any active subscription first to avoid further charges.
Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
All AI Agents, picks, and performance data will be permanently removed.

content.text: Go to Account settings and scroll to the bottom. Tap 'Delete Account' and confirm. Your account will be scheduled for deletion and all data will be removed within 30 days.
This action is permanent. Once your account is deleted, it cannot be recovered.
